inst✝¹ : Algebra K L
inst✝ : ValuativeExtension K L
⊢ ∀ (r : ↥(valuation K).integer) (x : ↥(valuation L).integer),
    { toFun := fun r => ⟨(algebraMap K L) ↑r, ⋯⟩, map_one' := ⋯, map_mul' := ⋯, map_zero' := ⋯, map_add' := ⋯ } r * x =
      x * { toFun := fun r => ⟨(algebraMap K L) ↑r, ⋯⟩, map_one' := ⋯, map_mul' := ⋯, map_zero' := ⋯, map_add' := ⋯ } r

proof:

    intro r x
    simp [mul_comm]
    <;>
    simp_all [Algebra.commutes']
    <;>
    aesop
